overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game (Mafia III) showing a character walking through a rainy night in a historic New Orleans French Quarter-style district. The character navigates covered sidewalks, crosses wet streets with light traffic, and passes neon-lit storefronts while the camera follows smoothly from behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with historic architecture

events.description: child companion stops and turns away, leaving ego to continue alone

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered brick sidewalk, passing historic buildings with red shutters and wrought iron balconies

notable_agents.action: child in striped shirt walking alongside ego before stopping and turning back

entered.detail: brick-paved pedestrian walkway covered by building overhangs
multi-story brick buildings with red wooden shutters and wrought iron balcony railings
ornate black wrought iron railings on upper floors of buildings
black cast iron street lamps illuminating the walkway

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with the character walking along a covered brick sidewalk in a historic district at night. A child companion walks alongside initially but stops and turns away. The walkway is lined with historic buildings featuring red shutters and wrought iron balconies, illuminated by warm street lamps.

scene_state.functional_zone: wet city street with parked vehicles

events.description: exits covered sidewalk and steps onto wet asphalt street
white car passes by on the right while crossing the road

agents.ego_description: running across the wet asphalt street, navigating between parked cars and avoiding moving traffic

notable_agents.action: white sedan driving down the street, headlights illuminating the wet road surface

entered.detail: wet black asphalt street with yellow lane markings reflecting street lights
vintage white sedan parked along the curb

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from the covered walkway onto a wet asphalt street, running across to the opposite side. A white car passes by with headlights cutting through the rainy night. The open street reveals more of the historic cityscape with buildings lining both sides.

events.description: passing under bright pink neon sign illuminating the sidewalk
briefly accompanied by a child in blue shirt walking alongside

agents.ego_description: walking along the commercial sidewalk, passing neon-lit storefronts and briefly interacting with a child pedestrian

notable_agents.action: child in blue shirt walking alongside ego for a brief moment before continuing on

entered.detail: large pink neon sign reading 'DAMES ROUGES' with 'GIRLS GIRLS GIRLS' underneath
blue and white neon sign reading 'OPEN 24 HOURS'
chalkboard A-frame sign with pink illustration advertising girls and drinks

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a commercial sidewalk illuminated by vibrant neon signs, including a prominent pink 'DAMES ROUGES' sign and a blue 'OPEN 24 HOURS' sign. The atmosphere shifts to a more nightlife-oriented setting with chalkboard signage and storefronts. A child in a blue shirt briefly walks alongside the character.

scene_state.functional_zone: street corner with crosswalk and historic intersection

events.description: stops at street corner to look around at the surrounding buildings and intersection
crosses the street via the crosswalk, returning to the original side

agents.ego_description: pausing at the street corner to survey the area, then crossing the street via the crosswalk

entered.detail: white striped pedestrian crossing on the wet asphalt
illuminated decorative bridge structure visible in the distance down the street

segments.scene_description: The character stops at a street corner, taking in the view of the historic intersection with a decorative bridge arch visible in the distance. After observing the surroundings, the character crosses the street via the crosswalk, with the camera panning to show the wet streets and illuminated buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with foot traffic

events.description: encountering more pedestrians walking along the covered sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk, passing other pedestrians including a man in a hat and a woman

notable_agents.action: man in light-colored hat and shirt standing near the curb, then walking

entered.detail: black public trash receptacle on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character walking along the covered sidewalk again, now encountering more pedestrian traffic. The character passes by a man in a hat standing near the curb and continues down the brick-paved walkway, with historic buildings and street lamps lining the path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rainy historic district, transitioning from quiet residential walkways to a vibrant neon-lit commercial hub before returning to a pedestrian-filled street. It begins with the character walking along a covered brick sidewalk lined with red shutters and wrought iron balconies, where a child companion briefly accompanies them. As the character leaves the shelter of the walkway, the scene opens up to a wet asphalt street where headlights from a passing white car cut through the rain. The environment then shifts toward a nightlife atmosphere, passing under the glow of pink and blue neon signs and chalkboard storefronts before the camera pans across a wide intersection featuring a distant decorative bridge arch. Finally, the character crosses the street and returns to a covered brick path, moving past a man in a hat and other pedestrians under the warm light of street lamps.
